stemHtml: You are flying towards an aerodrome west of a mountain ridge. Cumuliform clouds are at the height of the top of the ridge overhead the aerodrome. Wind is coming from the west. Where would you expect the highest risk of aircraft icing?

options.a: On the Eastern side of the ridge, at the same height as the ridge.
options.b: On the Eastern side of the ridge, halfway up its slope.
options.c: On the Western side of the ridge, at the same height as the ridge.
options.d: On the Western side of the ridge, halfway up its slope.
